welcome_desc: DS-APM is a unified monitoring platform that provides integrated observability across your services and infrastructure, enabling rapid incident detection and response. We will now guide you through the key features.
home_desc: This is the first screen displayed after signing in. You can review service health, key metrics, priority alerts, and trends at a glance.
alerts_desc: This menu allows you to create and manage alert rules. You can review incident and resolution notifications and configure delivery to designated channels.
dashboards_desc: Create dashboards that visualize key metrics and share them with your team members.
more_desc: Detailed analysis features such as Services, Logs, Traces, Metrics, and Infra Monitoring are available under the MORE menu.
settings_desc: This menu manages platform-wide settings, including data retention, AI and automation, notification channels, and your account.
finish_desc: DS-APM is now ready for use. Please access the features you need from the left menu.
